$description: Flat, agent-checkable acceptance criteria for "Vacation Care — Office". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs.

criteria.assert: prev disabled at 2025-01; next disabled at 2027-12

criteria.text: Activities only show in the data month.
Clicking an activity opens its Forms table.
criteria.assert: click(activityChip) -> route == S4 with activity in context

criteria.text: Day/Week/Month switch changes the view; nav pages by that unit.
criteria.assert: view=week -> 7 day columns; view=day -> 1 column; ‹/› step by week/day respectively

criteria.text: Add Activity is hidden until the day cell is hovered/focused.
criteria.assert: .vc-add opacity==0 by default AND ==1 on day-cell :hover/:focus-within

criteria.text: Status filters narrow the list and show counts.
criteria.assert: click(filter=draft) -> rows all status==draft AND filter label count matches

criteria.text: Delete always routes through a confirm dialog.
criteria.assert: click(delete) -> alertdialog visible; confirm removes the program

criteria.text: View action appears only for published programs.
Row menu is contextual to whether a form is attached.
criteria.assert: menu(activity without form) == [Add form,Duplicate,Delete]; menu(activity with form) == [Edit form,Remove form,Duplicate,Delete]

criteria.text: Edit form opens the dialog pre-filled.
criteria.assert: Edit form -> dialog[name,file,mandatory] populated from the activity

criteria.text: Remove form detaches the form from the activity.
criteria.assert: Remove form -> activity.form == null AND indicator pill gone

criteria.text: Save is disabled until the form has a name.
Missing rows never show an 'Attached by' name.
Notify count equals the number of missing rows.
